chunks.text: Technical Reports - Manuel Blum. A Simple Secure Pseudo-Random Number Generator (M82/65) by L. Blum, M. Blum and M. Shub. How to Exchange (Secret) Keys (M81/90) by Manuel Blum. On the Power of the Compass (or why Mazes are Easier to Search than Graphs) (M78/64) by M. Blum and W. Kozen.
On the Capability of Finite Automata in 2 and 3 Dimensional Space (M78/35) by Manuel Blum and William J. Sakoda. Inductive Inference: A Recursion Theoretic Approach (M386) by L. Blum and M. Blum.
